contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 10
- Description: dapp: fix Uncaught SyntaxError on report_inventory_movement.html (PR #37)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp_beta/pull/37
  
  Details:
  Gary reported: Uncaught SyntaxError: Identifier 'recipientName' has already been declared on https://dapp.truesight.me/report_inventory_movement.html. That class of error kills ALL inline script on the page (parse-time, not runtime), so every interactive behavior breaks at once.
  
  Root cause: inside async function onBatchSubmit() (around lines 1001-1046), lines 1001-1002 declared recipientName + publicKey via const. Then ~40 lines later the SAME function re-declared both via const — illegal in the same block scope.
  
  Fix in PR #37: drop the redeclarations (the originals are still in scope where they're used) + add a one-line comment to head off the next 'these look unused, safe to add' edit.
  
  Validated 8 inline script blocks parse clean via Node Function() smoke before push. Other const recipientName / const publicKey occurrences in the file are in different function scopes — those are correct.
  
  Merged to dapp_beta, promoted to dapp_prod via gh repo sync (no --force, CNAME divergence preserved: beta.dapp.truesight.me / dapp.truesight.me). Live URL now serves the fixed version.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 16.67
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
